objective: Validate a public-safe protocol fixture without contacting external devices.
authority_ceiling: read fixture files and run local validators only
energy_policy: ordinary foreground validation, no background overnight work
required_approvals: operator approval for any non-local execution
verification_predicate: fixture validates against matching local schema
residual_policy: record validator failure as residual; do not retry on rented nodes
non_claims: This fixture does not execute a personal compute hive.
This fixture does not prove scheduling, privacy, or federation safety.
